title: malaxis obcordata
intro: Malaxis obcordata, also known as the heart-leaved orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malaxis obcordata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and alleviate gastrointestinal problems. Malaxis obcordata is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by boiling its leaves in water, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
